task_description: Integrate Azure AI multi-service features (Computer Vision OCR, Translator, Text Analytics) to create unique financial tools that boost PRO plan value. Build: Document Scanner for receipts/invoices, Multilingual Financial Translator for Indian languages, Financial Health Analyzer with sentiment scoring, and update pricing/premium pages to showcase new features.

verification.summary: pnpm build succeeds with 0 errors. All 5 new tool pages render (/tools/document-scanner, /tools/translator, /tools/financial-health). pnpm lint shows 0 new errors from our code (only pre-existing lint issues in other files). All API routes properly call Azure services with correct endpoints and headers. Code review issues addressed: hardcoded API key replaced with env vars, rate limiting added, privacy claim fixed, OCR timeout reduced, image size validation added, subscription reading fixed.
